earlyGuidance: No sooner than 26 days after last injection

notDueGuidance.idealSteps: The Abilify Maintena injection is not due. Please consult guidance on early dosing.

routineGuidance.idealSteps:
(1) Administer usual Abilify Maintena monthly dose

(2) Arrange for next usual monthly dose in 4 weeks

reinitiateGuidance.idealSteps:
Re-initiate:

(1) Administer usual Abilify Maintena monthly dose

(2) Notify patient of the options recommended for reinitiation: either (a) receive a 2nd Abilify Maintena dose at the same time as the first (in step 1) or within days, or (b) resume oral aripiprazole (10-20 mg) for 14 days
reinitiateGuidance.pragmaticVariations: If the patient is not able or likely to take oral aripiprazole or get a 2nd injection immediately, consult with provider about accelerating timing of next injection.
reinitiateGuidance.providerNotification: Post-injection: notify provider of situation and need for either a 2nd immediate monthly injection or 14 days of oral aripiprazole.

fields.label: Date of last Abilify Maintena injection
Number of prior consecutive monthly Abilify Maintena injections received

requiredFields.message: Please enter the date of last Abilify Maintena injection.
Please select the number of prior consecutive monthly injections.
